module.name: server
module.purpose: Server crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt/step/execution orchestration and server-side plan runtime storage. The binary hosts telemetry on config.server.telemetry_port, Session binds client and host listeners from config.server.ip plus their server ports, Step emits flat StepDraft model plan events, and ExecutionHub tracks tool executions keyed by execution signature before completing steps.

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Owns server-side execution tracking: Execution values keyed by ExecutionSignature that accumulate ordered output and finalize on the expected update count, and an ExecutionHub holding a Mutex<HashMap<ExecutionSignature, Execution>> that spawns execution steps, routes Update/Succeed events, and emits StepEvent::Complete to the step layer on completion while reporting per-signature status.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns server model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. Internal backend implementations expose request directly instead of a send adapter.

childModules.name: plan
childModules.purpose: Owns server-side plan runtime orchestration. Plan delegates StepDraft conversion to Step::from_draft without numeric step-number allocation, exposes run step signatures, and works with PlanHub, PlanRecord, PlanStringify, and PlanError for routing, storage, rendering, and invalid draft reporting.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Defines the server prompt interface, render_template rendering, InitialPrompt, and AnalysisPrompt for execution-output analysis.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, binding client and host listener addresses from config.server.ip plus the configured server ports, forwarding Task status/preview and Step events to clients through a matches! filter, routing task, step, execution, and plan events back to the owning Task worker, plus SessionContext snapshots for prompts.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns the server runtime Step type, flat StepDraft to runtime StepKind conversion, task-step routing, internal Initial/Analysis flat StepDraft plan creation, model JSON answer/plan handling, model-prompt rendering, completion handling, and execution delegation.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns server task runtime and TaskState (session context, plan_hub, an ExecutionHub owning execution tracking, and a StepId-keyed step queue); step routing lives on Step, plan events route to PlanHub, and execution spawning/routing lives in the execution hub.
